title: Analysis continuity update: preserve MAPE gains, refine bottleneck mapping
summary: The next empirical iteration should start from the current calibration and focus narrowly on NCU bottleneck mapping.

sections.next_action: Run a targeted isomer-deepsci-experiment that adjusts white-box compute/memory component weights and re-profiles configs on B200.
sections.dependencies: Access to the same NVIDIA B200 host and NCU tooling. The existing 540-config measurement set as the baseline comparison.
sections.risks: NCU profiling is time-consuming; prioritize the validation set and a stratified query subset. Bottleneck labels may remain noisy for small kernels due to launch-overhead dominance.
